ValidationRule.description: Blocked user to save update record status to In service if no account is present
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( !$User.BypassValidationRules__c, ISBLANK(Platform__c), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Client_delivery_request', ISPICKVAL(Data_Solutions_Type__c , 'Ad Hoc Data & Client Reporting Request'),
OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,'Data Solution'), ISPICKVAL(Type,'Solvency') ), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'In Service'), ISCHANGED(Status), Total_Multi_Contacts__c = 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please insert at least one Multi Contact record
